title: Breast pump device
abstract: A breast pump device (1) is adapted to enable realization of at least two batches (A, B) of breast milk as a direct result of a single pumping session to be performed on at least one user's breast, which batches (A, B) are different as far as the value of at least one quality parameter of the breast milk is concerned. The device (1) comprises a detection unit (50) for performing real-time detection of the at least one quality parameter in a flow of breast milk and outputting a detection signal representing an actual value of the at least one quality parameter, and further comprises a controller (70) for receiving the detection signal from the detection unit (50) and using the signal in a process of determining an appropriate setting of the device (1) as far as the choice of a destination position of the milk is concerned.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. Breast pump device (1, 2), adapted to enable realization of at least two batches (A, B) of breast milk as a direct result of a single pumping session to be performed on at least one user's breast, which batches (A, B) are different as far as the value of at least one quality parameter of the breast milk is concerned, and which batches (A, B) are realized at different destination positions (41, 42), the device (1, 2) comprising - a detection unit (50) for performing real-time detection of the at least one quality parameter in a flow of breast milk extracted from the at least one user's breast during a pumping session, and outputting a detection signal representing an actual value of the at least one quality parameter, and - a controller (70) for receiving the detection signal from the detection unit (50), real-time determining a relation between the actual value of the at least one quality parameter and a reference value, and controlling the device (1, 2) on the basis of the relation as determined to direct the flow of breast milk to a destination position (41, 42) which is appropriate in view of the relation as determined. 2. Breast pump device (1, 2) according to claim 1, comprising at least two connection arrangements (31, 32) allowing for connection of at least two receptacles (41, 42) for receiving breast milk to the device (1, 2), and a separation unit (60) for allowing milk to flow to a connected receptacle (41, 42) through at least one of the at least two connection arrangements (31, 32) and for preventing milk to flow to a connected receptacle (41, 42) through at least one other of the at least two connection arrangements (31, 32). 3. Breast pump device (1, 2) according to claim 2, the controller (70) being adapted to set a condition of the separation unit (60). 4. Breast pump device (1, 2) according to claim 2 or 3, the separation unit (60) comprising a valve (61) which is movable between a first position for closing one of the connection arrangements (31, 32) while leaving the other of the connection arrangements (31, 

 32) open and a second position for closing the other of the connection arrangements (31, 32) while leaving the one of the connection arrangements (31, 32) open. 5. Breast pump device (1, 2) according to any of claims 1-4, comprising an information unit (71) for providing real-time information about the at least one quality parameter to the user of the device (1, 2). 6. Breast pump device (1, 2) according to claim 5, the information unit (71) being adapted to issue a warning signal to the user in case the actual value of the at least one quality parameter passes from one side of the reference value to the other. 7. Breast pump device (1, 2) according to any of claims 1-6, the detection unit (50) being adapted to detect milk fat concentration. 8. Breast pump device (1, 2) according to claim 7, the detection unit (50) being adapted to detect milk fat concentration on the basis of a light scattering measurement technique. 9. Breast pump device (1, 2) according to claim 8, the detection unit (50) being adapted to detect milk fat concentration on the basis of infrared spectroscopy or near infrared spectroscopy. 10. Breast pump device (1, 2) according to any of claims 1-9, comprising a user interface (72) for allowing a user to set the reference value of the at least one quality parameter.
